name: New lead welcome SMS
description: When a new patient submits the intake form, send a single warm, reassuring SMS welcoming them to Bright Smile Dental.

args.body: Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — thanks for reaching out! We got your info and someone from our team will follow up shortly to find a time that works for you. No pressure, no sales pitch — just here to make dental care feel easy. 🦷
